content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-international-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Sri Lanka is one of the most popular honeymoon destinations in Asia. Plan a romantic getaway with Sri Lanka honeymoon packages from ATW Travels. We are expert tour planners from South India, providing great deals on specialized packages that best suit your needs. With plenty of romantic fun and outdoor activities, our packages will help you make memories of a lifetime and bring you closer.

Our carefully crafted Sri Lanka honeymoon packages for couples promise comfort and convenience at a budget you can afford.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Why is Sri Lanka the Perfect Honeymoon Destination?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

From serene beaches and stunning nature to locations that provide fascinating history and cultural attractions, Sri Lanka is a perfect honeymoon destination for couples. This island country is also known for its incredible food culture that newlyweds can explore. Choose one of ATW Travels’s best Sri Lankan honeymoon packages to avail a wholesome and memorable experience, especially tailored for you.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26307″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What is the Best Time Visit Sri Lanka?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

The best time to visit Sri Lanka as a couple is usually from December to April, as the skies are clear, and you may find yourself surrounded by lush landscapes. ATW Travels can also customize a Sri Lanka trip package for couples in the monsoons from May, especially if you find the rains romantic. You can choose a package according to your choice of season and your convenience.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Is a Trip to Sri Lanka Affordable?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Sri Lanka is not only a romantic honeymoon retreat but also happens to be one of the most affordable travel destinations in Asia. With ATW Travels, you can rely on Sri Lanka honeymoon packages customized with absolute transparency and cost-effectiveness in mind.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Which are the Romantic Attractions in Sri Lanka?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Sri Lanka offers many romantic couple retreats, from perfect beach destinations to resorts with lush greenery. Our romantic Sri Lanka honeymoon tour package can take you to beautiful tropical lagoons and rivers to experience water sports activities. As a couple, you may choose spots that offer swimming, jet-ski, windsurfing, parasailing, or a romantic river safari. As a honeymoon destination, couples seek fun activities, romantic places, and privacy in Sri Lanka. ATW Travels ensure that every day of your Sri Lanka trip is a memorable experience.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26308″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Popular Romantic Getaways Included in Our Sri Lanka Honeymoon Package:

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Bentota Beach” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Bentota is an exotic beach with lagoons stretched alongside, with the tropical greenery giving it a serene look. The beach also has multiple options at varying budgets for water sports, adventure activities, and Ayurveda treatments for you.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Nuwara Eliya” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Known for its quaint and picturesque English town vibe, Nuwara Eliya offers many beautiful attractions for honeymoon couples. They can also participate in outdoor activities like trekking, hiking, and camping amidst beautiful waterfalls. Or, you could indulge in some high tea at the nearby tea factories and plantations. Lake Gregory is also a great attraction that offers a memorable countryside experience.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Colombo” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Colombo offers the best mix of seashores, multi-cultural experiences, fine cuisine, and romantic escapades. Visits to well-known islands for a quiet romantic dinner amidst coral reefs and rocky islets will make your heart flutter.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Kandy” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

For honeymoon couples, Kandy offers a beautiful blend of culture and tradition. You can enjoy the Temple of the Sacred Tooth Relic and the Royal Palace of Kandy, the last of its kind. You can visit the elephant orphanage to watch these tuskers bathe, or even bottle feed some baby elephants for a small fee.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Dambulla” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Dambulla is a place with ancient temples and offers a panoramic view of the mountains. A treasure trove of monuments that are not only historic but also equally spectacular.

Prominent attractions in Dambulla include Rose Quartz Mountain, Dambulla Cave Temple, Minneriya National Park, Sigiriya, and the Hurula Forest Reserve.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26309″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Is Sri Lanka a Shopping Hotspot?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Sri Lanka is a shopper’s paradise. Ceylon tea is famous all over the world and available in a variety of flavours, including cinnamon, dried fruits, and other local spices. If you are looking for souvenirs to bring home, consider shopping for them in one of the many bazaars.

Traditional hand-crafted wooden masks that were once used to fend off evil are now famous as decorative pieces. Sri Lanka is also popular for precious stones, including rubies, topazes, amethyst, aquamarines, and blue sapphires. Buddhist figurines and elephant statues are also equally popular as souvenirs. We design Sri Lanka honeymoon packages that cover almost most shopping destinations.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What are the Famous Sri Lankan Food Delicacies?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

A trip to Sri Lanka is well known for its rich and diverse cuisine. Each unique dish packs a punch of flavour with its home-grown rich spices.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646219480708{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1653552832139{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Dream Vacay Today!

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Kottu Roti” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Kottu Roti is a must-have since it is the national dish of Sri Lanka. It is a bread, chopped and stir-fried with vegetables and spices and can be customized according to your palate with eggs, cheese and meat.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Fish Ambul Thiyal” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Seafood is in abundance in Sri Lanka since it is an island in the Indian Ocean. Amongst the many curries, Fish Ambul Thiyal is one of the most relished delicacies in the country. The dry fish curry is traditionally sour, and the spices give the curry a unique taste and help preserve the fish. It is available in most restaurants served with hot rice.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26305″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Hoppers or Appam” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Hoppers are available almost everywhere in Sri Lanka, as street food, and most restaurants. It is a round bread made with coconut milk and rice flour. The egg appams are also very popular. Hoppers get usually served with sambol, which acts like a spicy accompaniment.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How to Travel to and Within Sri Lanka?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

The best way to travel from India to Sri Lanka is by taking a flight to Sri Lanka’s main international airport, The Colombo International Airport. You can opt for our Sri Lanka honeymoon package with flight charges included for easy and convenient travel.

We provide air-conditioned vehicles to help you travel within Sri Lanka to various destinations included in your Sri Lanka honeymoon package and offer assured 24/7 support and assistance at any point of your travel. We’ll take care of everything, including airport transfers and sightseeing. All you need to do is fill in the details, and we’ll take care of everything. Get to know about our daily offers by visiting our Instagram Profile.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_empty_space height=”20px” css=”.vc_custom_1646650087460{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]
